evals.prompt: Get the transcript from this YouTube video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw and save it to the output folder as a .txt file.
evals.expected_output: A .txt file in the output folder containing the English transcript of the video, named something like Me_at_the_zoo_<timestamp>.txt

evals.prompt: Download the transcript from https://youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ and write it to a text file in the output directory.
evals.expected_output: A .txt file in the output folder containing the English transcript of the video, named something like Rick_Astley_-_Never_Gonna_Give_You_Up_<timestamp>.txt

evals.prompt: Try to get the transcript from this fake URL https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FAKE1234567 and save it. It should show an error because the video doesn't exist.
evals.expected_output: An error message explaining that the transcript could not be retrieved (video not found or no transcript available). No file should be created.
Confirmation that the URL is valid and extraction of the video ID: dQw4w9WgXcQ

evals.prompt: Check if this is a valid YouTube URL: not-a-youtube-url
evals.expected_output: Error message indicating the URL is invalid with examples of supported formats

evals.prompt: Get transcript with detailed output info: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw
evals.expected_output: Transcript saved confirmation with file path, size, line count, and word count
